channel.title: Caramel on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Caramel on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Vanilla Latte Recipe (Hot, Iced, and Caramel Variation)
item.description: The best vanilla latte recipe for home — hot or iced, with simple homemade vanilla syrup. Includes caramel latte variation and tips for every milk type.
